headline: Assessing Xylem (NYSE:XYL) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness And Perceived Discount
summary: Xylem (XYL) has been drawing attention after a period of mixed share performance, with a recent month decline and softer past 3 months return contrasting with a modest 1 year total return gain. See our latest analysis for Xylem. The current US$120.44 share price follows a 30-day share price decline of 6.4% and a 90-day share price decline of 13.42%, while the 1-year total shareholder return of 2.91% points to longer-term gains alongside fading recent momentum as investors reassess growth...

headline: Xylem Ties World Water Day Push To Long Term ESG Story
summary: Xylem (NYSE:XYL) is putting a spotlight on its role in global clean water programs ahead of World Water Day 2026. The company is promoting its involvement in World Water Day and related "Wave of Action" initiatives focused on water access, quality and community engagement. These efforts highlight Xylem's emphasis on social impact and environmental stewardship as key parts of its corporate mission. Xylem, a water technology company listed on the NYSE under the ticker XYL, is closely linking...
